html:
Exclusive to:

Tab Icon.

The Doors Tab is a crafting category exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found under the Renovate Tab. House Expansion Permit and Demolition Permit can be used on doors.

Craftable Items and Structures

The following items and structures can be acquired in the Doors Tab:

Name Recipe Description Spawn Code

Hardwood Door		 ×10 "Crowning achievement in crown molding." wood_door

Stone Archway		 ×10 "The keystone to good living space." stone_door

Forest Door		 ×15 "It just grew that way." organic_door

Wrought Iron Door		 ×15 "An ornamental ingress." iron_door

Gothic Door		 ×20 "Bats were harmed in the making of this." pillar_door

Curtained Door		 ×15 "Offers little in sound proofing." curtain_door

Round Doorway		 ×20 "Includes a curtain of teeth." round_door

Industrial Door		 ×15 "For the metal lover." plate_door

Gallery

  • Doors concept art from Rhymes With Play #237
plainText:
Exclusive to:
Tab Icon.
The Doors Tab is a crafting category exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found under the Renovate Tab. House Expansion Permit and Demolition Permit can be used on doors.
Craftable Items and Structures[edit | edit source]
The following items and structures can be acquired in the Doors Tab:
Name
Recipe
Description
Spawn Code
Hardwood Door
×10
"Crowning achievement in crown molding."
wood_door
“I wood like to see whats through there.”
–Wilson, when examining a Hardwood Door
“It's wood. I could burn it.”
–Willow, when examining a Hardwood Door
“Wolfgang carved it with his own hands.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Hardwood Door
“Only leads to disappointment.”
–Wendy, when examining a Hardwood Door
“EXTERNAL EXPANSION PORT”
–WX-78, when examining a Hardwood Door
“Suitable entrance for a library.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Hardwood Door
“Yep. That's a good door.”
–Woodie, when examining a Hardwood Door
“It's a door. You go through it.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Hardwood Door
“I've broadened my horizons. And my home.”
–Wagstaff, when examining a Hardwood Door
“Henceförth tö anöther rööm!”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Hardwood Door
“A door to another room.”
–Webber, when examining a Hardwood Door
“A door. I should go through it.”
–Walani, when examining a Hardwood Door
“A taste of oak.”
–Warly, when examining a Hardwood Door
“Woodlegs' acquired another poop deck.”
–Woodlegs, when examining a Hardwood Door
“ENTER WILBA”
–Wilba, when examining a Hardwood Door
“Door of friends”
–Wormwood, when examining a Hardwood Door
“More storage space. I like it!”
–Wheeler, when examining a Hardwood Door
Stone Archway
×10
"The keystone to good living space."
stone_door
“That door rocks.”
–Wilson, when examining a Stone Archway
“Not even burnable.”
–Willow, when examining a Stone Archway
“Mighty door for mighty room.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Stone Archway
“Only leads to disappointment.”
–Wendy, when examining a Stone Archway
“EXTERNAL EXPANSION PORT”
–WX-78, when examining a Stone Archway
“What a lovely keystone.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Stone Archway
“That's a door, eh.”
–Woodie, when examining a Stone Archway
“A door to another room.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Stone Archway
“The doorway to expanding my horizons.”
–Wagstaff, when examining a Stone Archway
“Yönder lies anöther rööm!”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Stone Archway
“That door rocks!”
–Webber, when examining a Stone Archway
“A door. I should go through it.”
–Walani, when examining a Stone Archway
“Like entering a traditional stone oven.”
–Warly, when examining a Stone Archway
“Heavier than m'anchor.”
–Woodlegs, when examining a Stone Archway
“AS COLDETH AS ANY STONE”
–Wilba, when examining a Stone Archway
“Another room”
–Wormwood, when examining a Stone Archway
“Keep the doorway up while I'm gone adventuring.”
–Wheeler, when examining a Stone Archway
Forest Door
×15
"It just grew that way."
organic_door
“I feel like it's watching me.”
–Wilson, when examining a Forest Door
“It's wood. I could burn it.”
–Willow, when examining a Forest Door
“Hehe. Is like little man.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Forest Door
“Only leads to disappointment.”
–Wendy, when examining a Forest Door
“EXTERNAL EXPANSION PORT”
–WX-78, when examining a Forest Door
“Quite a unique design.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Forest Door
“Yep. That's a good door.”
–Woodie, when examining a Forest Door
“A door to another room.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Forest Door
“Intriguing. The internal expansion is not visible from the outside.”
–Wagstaff, when examining a Forest Door
“A döör öf Yggdrasil.”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Forest Door
“Ha! That doorway looks like it has eyes.”
–Webber, when examining a Forest Door
“Hope it's not still alive.”
–Walani, when examining a Forest Door
“Organic.”
–Warly, when examining a Forest Door
“That way lays a'cabin.”
–Woodlegs, when examining a Forest Door
“HATH THE CUTE FEETSIES”
–Wilba, when examining a Forest Door
“Hello? Welcome”
–Wormwood, when examining a Forest Door
“That's not creepy at all.”
–Wheeler, when examining a Forest Door
Wrought Iron Door
×15
"An ornamental ingress."
iron_door
“A door I can go through.”
–Wilson, when examining a Wrought Iron Door
“Not even burnable.”
–Willow, when examining a Wrought Iron Door
“Wolfgang bend iron with own hands.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Wrought Iron Door
“Only leads to disappointment.”
–Wendy, when examining a Wrought Iron Door
“FULL OF IRRELEVANT TWIRLY THINGS”
–WX-78, when examining a Wrought Iron Door
“Lovely ironwork.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Wrought Iron Door
“Nice ironwork.”
–Woodie, when examining a Wrought Iron Door
“A door to another room.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Wrought Iron Door
“An elaborate entryway to another room.”
–Wagstaff, when examining a Wrought Iron Door
“Leads nöt tö Valhalla, but tö anöther rööm.”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Wrought Iron Door
“Must have taken some time to make that.”
–Webber, when examining a Wrought Iron Door
“A door. I should go through it.”
–Walani, when examining a Wrought Iron Door
“A nice flourish.”
–Warly, when examining a Wrought Iron Door
“That way lays a'cabin.”
–Woodlegs, when examining a Wrought Iron Door
“ENTER WILBA”
–Wilba, when examining a Wrought Iron Door
“Twirly door”
–Wormwood, when examining a Wrought Iron Door
“It's a garden gate that leads to a room.”
–Wheeler, when examining a Wrought Iron Door
Gothic Door
×20
"Bats were harmed in the making of this."
pillar_door
“I hope that bat is dead.”
–Wilson, when examining a Gothic Door
“Ha ha! That bat's dead.”
–Willow, when examining a Gothic Door
“Aggh!... Oh. Bat is not real.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Gothic Door
“Only leads to disappointment.”
–Wendy, when examining a Gothic Door
“EXTERNAL EXPANSION PORT”
–WX-78, when examining a Gothic Door
“How grotesque!”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Gothic Door
“Ugly fella, isn't he.”
–Woodie, when examining a Gothic Door
“Has a certain dramatic flare.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Gothic Door
“Welcoming.”
–Wagstaff, when examining a Gothic Door
“Stare nöt at me, bat!”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Gothic Door
“Spooky...”
–Webber, when examining a Gothic Door
“That bat's not gonna attack, is he?”
–Walani, when examining a Gothic Door
“Is that gold leaf edible?”
–Warly, when examining a Gothic Door
“Thar's gold in thar!”
–Woodlegs, when examining a Gothic Door
“RAT O' FLYING DOOR”
–Wilba, when examining a Gothic Door
“Hello! Hello?”
–Wormwood, when examining a Gothic Door
“A really fancy door to another room of my stuff.”
–Wheeler, when examining a Gothic Door
Curtained Door
×15
"Offers little in sound proofing."
curtain_door
“A door I can go through.”
–Wilson, when examining a Curtained Door
“It's curtains for that door.”
–Willow, when examining a Curtained Door
“Is not mighty door.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Curtained Door
“Only leads to disappointment.”
–Wendy, when examining a Curtained Door
“EXTERNAL EXPANSION PORT”
–WX-78, when examining a Curtained Door
“A charming shade of purple.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Curtained Door
“That's a door, eh.”
–Woodie, when examining a Curtained Door
“It barely hides anything.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Curtained Door
“Beguiling.”
–Wagstaff, when examining a Curtained Door
“Henceförth tö anöther rööm!”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Curtained Door
“We like the color.”
–Webber, when examining a Curtained Door
“Nice and cozy.”
–Walani, when examining a Curtained Door
“Tasteful.”
–Warly, when examining a Curtained Door
“Woodlegs' acquired another poop deck.”
–Woodlegs, when examining a Curtained Door
“ENTER WILBA”
–Wilba, when examining a Curtained Door
“Another room”
–Wormwood, when examining a Curtained Door
“All you really need is a curtain.”
–Wheeler, when examining a Curtained Door
Round Doorway
×20
"Includes a curtain of teeth."
round_door
“A little like being eaten.”
–Wilson, when examining a Round Doorway
“What's it smiling about?”
–Willow, when examining a Round Doorway
“Is mighty mouth.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Round Doorway
“Only leads to disappointment.”
–Wendy, when examining a Round Doorway
“EXPANSION PORT DISGUISED AS LARGE FLESH SACK”
–WX-78, when examining a Round Doorway
“I can see a Porcine influence to this door.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Round Doorway
“That's a strange door, eh Lucy?”
–Woodie, when examining a Round Doorway
“A little like being eaten.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Round Doorway
“Cordial.”
–Wagstaff, when examining a Round Doorway
“Döes it cönsume all that enter it?”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Round Doorway
“Is it... gonna eat us?”
–Webber, when examining a Round Doorway
“Is that pig gonna eat me?”
–Walani, when examining a Round Doorway
“Another mouth to feed!”
–Warly, when examining a Round Doorway
“Ah, she'll eat ol' Woodlegs clean up.”
–Woodlegs, when examining a Round Doorway
“IS ROUNDED WITH CHEEK”
–Wilba, when examining a Round Doorway
“Big mouth door”
–Wormwood, when examining a Round Doorway
“Is it... going to eat me?”
–Wheeler, when examining a Round Doorway
Industrial Door
×15
"For the metal lover."
plate_door
“A door I can go through.”
–Wilson, when examining an Industrial Door
“Not even burnable.”
–Willow, when examining an Industrial Door
“Wolfgang rivet it with own hands.”
–Wolfgang, when examining an Industrial Door
“Only leads to disappointment.”
–Wendy, when examining an Industrial Door
“I AM HOME”
–WX-78, when examining an Industrial Door
“Industrial library.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining an Industrial Door
“That's a door, eh.”
–Woodie, when examining an Industrial Door
“Little too industrial.”
–Maxwell, when examining an Industrial Door
“Riveting. It's like I never left the factory.”
–Wagstaff, when examining an Industrial Door
“Yönder lies anöther rööm!”
–Wigfrid, when examining an Industrial Door
“That doorway looks pretty strong.”
–Webber, when examining an Industrial Door
“Little harsh.”
–Walani, when examining an Industrial Door
“Maybe it leads to an industrial kitchen.”
–Warly, when examining an Industrial Door
“Has tha look o'tha iron sail to 'er.”
–Woodlegs, when examining an Industrial Door
“ENTER WILBA”
–Wilba, when examining an Industrial Door
“Another room”
–Wormwood, when examining an Industrial Door
“Well, I guess it's not going to fall down, anyway.”
–Wheeler, when examining an Industrial Door

title: Doors Tab
wikitext:
{{Exclusivity|Hamlet}} [[File:Doors.png|thumb|104x104px|Tab Icon.]] The '''Doors Tab''' is a crafting category exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. It is found under the [[Renovate Tab]].
